name: Astral-Rayquaza (Sky Apex)
description: A divine synthesis of Rayquaza and Necrozma. Wearing translucent starlight armor, it commands the celestial winds of the upper atmosphere.
originLore: Forged when Necrozma's light prism fused with the Sky High Pokémon during a cosmic meteor storm. It weaves constellations into defensive barriers.

lore.celestialConcordance: Astral-Rayquaza shields the multiversal skies from void invaders, refracting cosmic rays into shimmering aurora shields.

quantumResonators.name: Dragon Ascent (Astral)
quantumResonators.description: Dives through the astral plane, striking with the full kinetic energy of a falling star.

quantumResonators.name: Prism Aurora
quantumResonators.description: Envelops the field in a prismatic aurora that minimizes weak-type damage.
